summary: Completed comprehensive testing of player-level Comp/HCP toggles feature. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified working for both Rounds tab toggles and Score Entry page toggles. Toggles work independently and correctly affect leaderboard and handicap calculations.
passed_tests: Backend: PUT /api/scores/{score_id}/toggle-comp - Endpoint exists and returns 200
Backend: PUT /api/scores/{score_id}/toggle-comp - Returns correct response structure with message and is_included_in_comp
Backend: PUT /api/scores/{score_id}/toggle-comp - Toggling OFF excludes score from leaderboard (rounds_played decreases)
Backend: PUT /api/scores/{score_id}/toggle-comp - Returns 404 for non-existent score
Backend: PUT /api/scores/{score_id}/toggle-handicap - Endpoint exists and returns 200
Backend: PUT /api/scores/{score_id}/toggle-handicap - Returns correct response structure with message and is_included_in_handicap
Backend: PUT /api/scores/{score_id}/toggle-handicap - Affects player handicap calculation
Backend: PUT /api/scores/{score_id}/toggle-handicap - Returns 404 for non-existent score
Backend: Score model has is_included_in_comp and is_included_in_handicap fields (default true)
Backend: Comp and handicap toggles work independently
Frontend: Rounds tab - Comp toggles visible next to each player's score
Frontend: Rounds tab - HCP toggles visible next to each player's score
Frontend: Rounds tab - Toggling Comp OFF shows toast 'Score excluded from competition'
Frontend: Rounds tab - Toggling Comp OFF shows strikethrough on score points
Frontend: Rounds tab - Toggling HCP OFF shows toast 'Score excluded from handicap'
Frontend: Leaderboard - Updates correctly when Comp is toggled (rounds_played changes, avg recalculates)
Frontend: Score Entry page - 'Score Settings' section visible
Frontend: Score Entry page - 'Include in Competition' toggle present and functional
Frontend: Score Entry page - 'Include in Handicap' toggle present and functional
critical_code_review_comments: Backend toggle-comp endpoint correctly updates is_included_in_comp field and returns appropriate message
Backend toggle-handicap endpoint correctly updates is_included_in_handicap field and recalculates player handicap
Backend leaderboard endpoint correctly filters out scores where is_included_in_comp is false
Frontend Rounds tab shows Comp/HCP toggles with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Frontend Score Entry page has dedicated 'Score Settings' section with both toggles
UI provides clear visual feedback (strikethrough, toast messages) when toggles are changed
Toggles work independently - changing Comp does not affect HCP and vice versa
seed_data_creation: No new test data created. Used existing competition cb43af26-3474-47fc-b1c4-424d5141882f with Nathan D's scores (35 pts and 33 pts). All toggle states restored after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Player-level Comp/HCP toggles fully tested and working. Backend endpoints: PUT /api/scores/{score_id}/toggle-comp and PUT /api/scores/{score_id}/toggle-handicap. Frontend: Toggles visible in Rounds tab next to each player's score (data-testid='toggle-score-comp-{id}' and 'toggle-score-hcp-{id}'). Score Entry page has 'Score Settings' section with both toggles (data-testid='toggle-score-comp' and 'toggle-score-handicap'). When Comp OFF: score excluded from leaderboard, shows strikethrough. When HCP OFF: score excluded from handicap history, player handicap recalculated.
